script.name: !move.collectware.drones
script.description: M7D collect wares in space with drones

argument.name: notIndefinite
argument.desc: Finish command when no more wares to collect

script.sourceplaintext:
$hunting.wares = table alloc $remove.wares = array alloc: size=0 $waresToIgnore = array alloc: size=0
$aDrones = [THIS] ->get managed ships: role=Drone gosub sub.QueryDroneExamples
while [TRUE]
@ = [THIS] -> move around 30000 ms
* Cycle through wares being actively hunted and check if they've ceased to exist - if yes then send the assigned drone back to the carrier. $w = get next key: table=$hunting.wares key=null while $w if not $w -> exists $drone.array = $hunting.wares[$w] $drone = $drone.array[0] $ware = $drone.array[1] $amt = $drone.array[2] append $w to array $remove.wares if $drone -> get total volume in cargo bay @ START $drone -> call script !ship.cmd.ware.deliever : Target=[THIS] Ware=$ware Amount=$amt else * Command Carrier Return informs other scripts that this drone is not busy. START $drone -> command COMMAND_CARRIER_RETURN : arg1=null, arg2=null, arg3=null, arg4=null end end $w = get next key: table=$hunting.wares key=$w end
if size of array $remove.wares remove key $remove.wares from table $hunting.wares end
$aDrones = [THIS] ->get managed ships: role=Drone skip if arrays $aDrones and $savedDrones are equal gosub sub.QueryDroneExamples skip if size of array $aDrones continue
* Get valid wares in sector @ $wares = [THIS] -> call script !lib.get.valid.flying.wares : Sector to search=[SECTOR] =$waresToIgnore =$droneExamples
if not $wares do if $notIndefinite == [TRUE] break continue end
$waresToIgnore = $wares['ignore'] $wares = $wares['valid'] $i = size of array $wares if $i == 0 do if $notIndefinite == [TRUE] break end while $i dec $i = $w = $wares[$i] * Check if flying ware is currently being hunted if $hunting.wares[$w] $drone.array = $hunting.wares[$w] $drone = $drone.array[0] skip if $drone -> exists remove key $w from table $hunting.wares $cmd = $drone -> get command skip if $cmd == COMMAND_COLLECT_WARE remove key $w from table $hunting.wares do if $hunting.wares[$w] continue end
$amt = $w -> get flying ware count $ware = $w -> get ware type code of object
* Run through available drones and find one that can be assigned to ware, and then send it after it $j = size of array $aDrones while $j dec $j = $drone = $aDrones[$j] @ if [THIS] -> call script !lib.carrier.isshipbusy : Ship=$drone Allow Recall=[FALSE] remove element from array $aDrones at index $j continue end skip if $drone -> can transport ware $ware continue $free = $drone -> get free amount of ware $ware in cargo bay skip if $free >= $amt continue $drone.array = create new array, arguments=$drone, $ware, $amt, null, null $hunting.wares[$w] = $drone.array remove element from array $aDrones at index $j START $drone -> command COMMAND_COLLECT_WARE : arg1=$w, arg2=null, arg3=null, arg4=null break end end end
@ = [THIS] -> call script !carrier.recall : return null
* =========================================== * SUB: Make an array of "drone examples" from carrier's drone complement. * These examples are used when iterating through wares to check if any drone can transport them * =========================================== sub.QueryDroneExamples: $j = size of array $aDrones * Check if there are no drones left. do if $j == 0 AND $notIndefinite == [TRUE] return null
$waresToIgnore = array alloc: size=0 $droneExamples = array alloc: size=0
$savedDrones = $aDrones while $j dec $j = $drone = $aDrones[$j] $alreadyRepresented = [FALSE] $k = size of array $droneExamples while $k dec $k = $droneExample = $droneExamples[$k] $mainType = $droneExample -> get maintype $subType = $droneExample -> get subtype $mainType2 = $drone -> get maintype $subType2 = $drone -> get subtype if $mainType == $mainType2 AND $subType == $subType2 $alreadyRepresented = [TRUE] break end end do if $alreadyRepresented == [FALSE] append $drone to array $droneExamples end endsub return null

comment.var: Cycle through wares being actively hunted and check if they've ceased to exist - if yes then send the assigned drone back to the carrier.

line.text: get total volume in cargo bay

comment.var: Command Carrier Return informs other scripts that this drone is not busy.
Check if flying ware is currently being hunted

line.text: get ware type code of object

comment.var: Run through available drones and find one that can be assigned to ware, and then send it after it
SUB: Make an array of "drone examples" from carrier's drone complement.
These examples are used when iterating through wares to check if any drone can transport them
Check if there are no drones left.

sval.val: M7D collect wares in space with drones
Finish command when no more wares to collect
Cycle through wares being actively hunted and check if they've ceased to exist - if yes then send the assigned drone back to the carrier.
Command Carrier Return informs other scripts that this drone is not busy.
Check if flying ware is currently being hunted
Run through available drones and find one that can be assigned to ware, and then send it after it
SUB: Make an array of "drone examples" from carrier's drone complement.
These examples are used when iterating through wares to check if any drone can transport them
Check if there are no drones left.
